steps.title: Find the sentence's main verb
steps.content: The subject is Multiple newspapers, which is plural. The sentence needs a finite main verb to say what those newspapers do for the Spanish-speaking population of Washington, DC.

steps.title: Use a plural present verb
steps.content: B, C, and D are nonfinite verb forms, so they cannot serve as the main verb of this independent clause. The base-form present verb agrees with the plural subject and completes the sentence grammatically. The answer is A.
